description: You are a space debris analyst at a satellite operations center conducting a solar flux sensitivity study for the Sentinel-LEO satellite to assess orbital lifetime risk. Simulate a 60-day orbital decay for the spacecraft (SMA: 6971.14 km, ECC: 0.001, INC: 97.8 deg, DryMass: 450 kg, DragArea: 8.0 m^2, Cd: 2.2, Epoch: 01 Jan 2025 00:00:00.000 UTC) under three solar flux scenarios: Quiet Sun (F10.7 = 70, F10.7A = 70, Kp = 1), Moderate Sun
